title: pelargonium × diversilobum
intro: Pelargonium × diversilobum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Mountain Rose Geranium, is a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus and is native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × diversilobum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial activities, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × diversilobum are often used in teas, tinctures, and topical creams, and are commonly used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and digestive issues.
